description: Minimal focused changes for comma/period, launchers, and scroll

changes.rationale: CRITICAL: Period must be on base layer for typing flow. Currently has [ bracket which should be on Layer 1.
Move [ bracket from base layer to Layer 1 (programming layer) to make room for period.

changes.label: Search
changes.rationale: Left-hand launcher: Hold Nav thumb (x3,y4) + tap A position = Win+S search

changes.label: PT Run
changes.rationale: Left-hand launcher: Hold Nav thumb (x3,y4) + tap S position = Alt+Space PowerToys Run

changes.label: Search
changes.rationale: Right-hand launcher: Hold Window thumb (x8,y4) + tap J position = Win+S search

changes.label: PT Run
changes.rationale: Right-hand launcher: Hold Window thumb (x8,y4) + tap K position = Alt+Space PowerToys Run (NOTE: This replaces Win+Tab. User should confirm this is acceptable.)
changes.warning: This replaces existing Win+Tab binding. Verify with user first.

changes.label: Scroll
changes.rationale: Right-hand scroll toggle: In mouse mode, tap rightmost pinky key to toggle trackball scroll. Layer 6 overlay changes trackball to scroll mode.

notes: Layer 6 scroll mode requires input-processor configuration:
When Layer 6 active: PMW3610 trackball Y-axis → vertical scroll
When Layer 6 active: PMW3610 trackball X-axis → horizontal scroll (optional)
This can be configured through ZMK input-processors or pointing device settings.
IMPORTANT: Position (3,8,2) currently has Win+Tab. Replacing with PowerToys Run launcher.
If user needs Win+Tab, suggest alternative position.
Norwegian character support: Verify current method with user.
If using AltGr (Right Alt), check if it needs to be added to thumb cluster.
